description: The file 'Solar_Project.skp' is open in SketchUp Make 2017 with a flat-roof building model. Configure Skelion to use the specifications of a Canadian Solar HiKu CS3W-405P panel module. Open the Skelion configuration/database dialog and set the panel width to 1048 mm, panel length/height to 2108 mm, and wattage to 405 W. Once configured, insert at least one of these solar panels on the selected flat roof of the building. Finally, save the completed model to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\solar_panel_config.skp'.
